blocks.content: The fireworks finished with Eli's finale — three in quick succession, all white and gold — and then the field went quiet except for the fire and the fireflies and the fading echo of the municipal display dying out across town.
Kit and Daisy came back to the group.
Eli looked at Kit. Kit shook his head — don't. Eli absolutely did not honor that.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: The lanterns. The cooler. The fireworks. The warm white specifically — neutral white is too harsh for emotional moments, I did the research —
He stopped. Looked at the two of them — really looked.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: You two are good. You're actually — yeah. You're good.
Eli pulled Kit into a hug — sudden and real — and Kit went with it.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: I've been rooting for you both since ninth grade. Don't mess it up.
